Vardkatnihira as a poet
It is doubtless that Varahamihira ranks . among the greatest
poets of Sanskrit literature. He seems to be a great admirer of iTa/t-
ddsa who is designated as the Vildsa (grace) of the Muse of Poetry.
We may be permitted to include our author in this list of honour as—
"TOT: TO 5lTO:5'l It has been already pointed
out that the great Kashmirian critic, Ksemendra, holds him in high
esteem. Though he (Varaha) is conscious of the fact that he is
treating of scientific topics, yet the poet in him asserts himself and
makes his work a work of art too, a piece of excellent poetry — a
